title: Eranshahr · prologue draft
notes: The prologue opens on the road from Khorasan, not on Cyrus. Reframe: Eranshahr as a memory architecture, not a political map. The first scene is a teahouse, the second a cuneiform tablet, the third a satellite photograph — same place, three temperatures of seeing.
next_action: Cut paragraph three down to a single sentence. The cylinder belongs in chapter two, not the prologue.
last_session_summary: Drafted 1,800 words. Decided to lead with sensory image, not exposition.
